Functions
Printer_CheckReady
bool Printer_CheckReady()

Check of the printer is connected and ready

Return

FALSE if printer is not ready

Printer_SendChar
void Printer_SendChar(
u8 chr
) __FASTCALL

Send a character to printer using direct IO port access

Parameters
chr
u8

ASCII code of character to send

Printer_SendString
inline void Printer_SendString(
const char* str
)

Send a null-terminated string to printer using direct IO port access

Parameters
str
const char*

Pointer to the string to send

Printer_LineReturn
inline void Printer_LineReturn()

Send a carriage return to the printer

Printer_ChangePage
inline void Printer_ChangePage()

Send a change page code to the printer
